body: The bead is too large for this execution depth and cannot be cleanly split further here. Completing it would require coordinated changes across cli/internal/bead/axon_backend.go, cli/internal/bead/axon/*, store/backend plumbing, and the axon-backed test matrix, while the bead is already at the depth cap. The requested real Axon GraphQL path is also still blocked on the upstream dependencies noted in the bead metadata (axon-05c1019d and axon-82b6f7b2), so I am not making speculative partial changes.
